title: QuantumLink-Sim Commitment Record
description: Cryptographic commitment record produced by the QuantumLink-Sim integrity layer. Each RCAN message that passes through the commitment pipeline is signed and chained, creating an append-only audit log. Supports classical HMAC, simulated quantum key distribution (QKD), and hybrid modes.

id.description: UUIDv4 uniquely identifying this commitment record.

timestamp_ns.description: Unix epoch time in nanoseconds when the commitment was created. Nanosecond precision required for high-frequency telemetry chains.

payload_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the serialised RCAN message payload.

key_mode.description: Key derivation mode. 'classical' uses HMAC-SHA256. 'quantum' uses a simulated QKD-derived key. 'hybrid' XORs both.

qber.description: Quantum Bit Error Rate (0–1) from the QKD exchange. Null for classical mode. Values above 0.11 indicate a potential eavesdropping attempt.

key_secure.description: True if the key exchange passed security checks (QBER within threshold for quantum/hybrid; HMAC verified for classical).

chain_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the previous commitment record's chain_hash concatenated with this record's payload_hash. Forms an append-only hash chain.

proof.description: Cryptographic proof details for this commitment.

components.description: Ordered list of proof component identifiers (e.g. HMAC tag, QKD session ID).

combination.description: Algorithm used to combine proof components. E.g. 'xor', 'concat-sha256', 'hmac-sha256'.

qber.description: QBER value at proof finalisation. May differ slightly from the top-level qber if multiple QKD rounds were used.

quantum_secure.description: True if the proof satisfies quantum-security requirements (QBER < 0.11 and key length meets information-theoretic bound).

ai.description: Optional AI provenance metadata. Present when the committed message was generated by an AI model.

confidence.description: Self-reported confidence score (0–1) of the AI model at time of message generation.

thought_id.description: Optional reference to the AI reasoning trace that produced the committed message.
